entry.text: ōṁ  jay  bhagavadgītē    maiyā  jay  bhagavadgītē |
entry.iast: ōṁ  jay  bhagavadgītē    maiyā  jay  bhagavadgītē |

entry.text: hari-hiy  kamal-vihāriṇi  sundar  supunītē || ōṁ  jay ||
entry.iast: hari-hiy  kamal-vihāriṇi  sundar  supunītē || ōṁ  jay ||

entry.text: tattvjñān-vikāśini  vidyā  brahm  parā || ōṁ  jay ||
entry.iast: tattvjñān-vikāśini  vidyā  brahm  parā || ōṁ  jay ||

entry.text: śaraṇ-rahasy-pradāyini  sab  vidhi  sukhkārī || ōṁ  jay ||
entry.iast: śaraṇ-rahasy-pradāyini  sab  vidhi  sukhkārī || ōṁ  jay ||

entry.text: daivī  sadguṇ-dāyini  hari-rasikā  sajnī || ōṁ  jay ||
entry.iast: daivī  sadguṇ-dāyini  hari-rasikā  sajnī || ōṁ  jay ||

entry.text: samtā  tyāg  sikhāvni  hari-mukh  kī  vāṇī |
entry.iast: samtā  tyāg  sikhāvni  hari-mukh  kī  vāṇī |

entry.text: sakal  śāstr  kī  svāmini  śrutiyō  kī  rānī || ōṁ  jay ||
entry.iast: sakal  śāstr  kī  svāmini  śrutiyō  kī  rānī || ōṁ  jay ||

entry.text: hari-pad-prēm  pradāyini  apnō  kar  lījai || ōṁ  jay ||
entry.iast: hari-pad-prēm  pradāyini  apnō  kar  lījai || ōṁ  jay ||
